message:
feat: add decision-plane policy engine and evidence ledger tests

Implement shadow-mode policy engine (bd-izu.1) with progressive delivery
gates (observe→canary→enforce), guard integration, and automatic fallback.
Add decision-plane unit-test matrix (bd-izu.8) covering 5 invariant
families with seeded randomized property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
